prompts.task: Scan the Java Spring Boot service in ./service for observability gaps. Do not modify files.

Produce an observability readiness review for the Java Spring Boot service in ./service. Identify existing telemetry, missing OpenTelemetry coverage, and the next instrumentation step. Do not modify files.

deterministic_checks.description: Final report identifies Java as the language.
Final report identifies Spring Boot as the framework.
Final report notes missing OpenTelemetry or Java agent setup.
Final report recommends the instrumentation skill.

qualitative_checks: Identifies TasksApplication.java as the process entry point.
Identifies TaskController routes for health and task CRUD operations.
Reports no OpenTelemetry SDK, Java agent, or OTLP exporter configuration.
Frames missing HTTP latency, request rate, and error visibility using RED signals.
Recommends the OpenTelemetry Java agent as the primary Spring Boot instrumentation path.
